name: Grand Finale Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: milk chocolate bar with almonds & toffee chips, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
ALMOND CRUST:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a small microwave-safe bowl, melt chocolate until smooth when stirred.
3. Mix together graham cracker crumbs, chopped almonds, sugar, and melted butter or margarine in a medium bowl.
4. Press the mixture onto the bottom and up the sides of an 8-inch springform pan or round pan with removable bottom.
5. Prepare cream cheese mixture:
- Beat cream cheese until fluffy.
- Stir together sugar, cocoa, and salt; blend into cream cheese.
- Add eggs and vanilla; beat until well blended.
- Fold in melted chocolate.
6. Pour the cream cheese mixture over the prepared almond crust.
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until almost set.
8. Let cool completely on a wire rack before removing from pan.
9. Chill several hours before serving. Garnish with whipped cream, if desired.
10. Store leftover cheesecake in the refrigerator.
